title: eupatorium bartsiifolium var. trichophorum
intro: Eupatorium bartsiifolium var. trichophorum, also known as Bart's eupatorium or white snakeroot, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and acting as an antiseptic, which can help prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Eupatorium bartsiifolium var. trichophorum typically involve drying the plant's leaves and stems, then using them to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
